name: Let's Go Surfing
note: Long-running Sydney surf school teaching group, private and women-only lessons at Bondi Beach, with branches at Maroubra and northern NSW.

name: Let's Go Surfing
note: Maroubra Beach branch of Let's Go Surfing offering beginner group and private lessons with equipment supplied.

name: Let's Go Surfing
note: Northern NSW branch of Let's Go Surfing running lessons around Ballina and Lennox Head.

name: Manly Surf School
note: Teaching people to surf on Manly Beach and across Sydney's Northern Beaches since 1983, with group and private lessons.

name: Cronulla Surfing Academy
note: Surfing Australia accredited school on Cronulla Beach run by local surfer Blake Johnston, offering kids, adults and ladies lessons plus retreats.

name: Waves Surf School
note: ASI accredited surf school operating at Cronulla since 1999 with surf trips up the coast to Seal Rocks.

name: Newcastle Surf School
note: Newcastle's longest-running surf school teaching daily lessons at Nobbys, Blacksmiths and Caves beaches.

name: Learn to Surf Newcastle
note: Surfing Australia-approved school established in 2004 (originally Redhead Mobile Surf School) running small-group lessons around Newcastle.

name: Port Stephens Surf School
note: Port Stephens' first surf school, endorsed by Surfing Australia, running lessons at One Mile, Birubi and Fingal Bay beaches.

name: Great Lakes Surf School
note: Forster-based surf school licensed by Surfing Australia and Surfing NSW offering learn-to-surf lessons.

name: Gary Hughes Surf School
note: Boutique private and small-group lessons at Blueys, Boomerang, Seal Rocks, Booti Booti, Forster and Tuncurry beaches.

name: Saltwater Surf School
note: Runs daily surf lessons at Forster-Tuncurry and other Barrington Coast beaches with experienced coaches.

name: Central Coast Surf Academy
note: Founded by a former world-ranked pro, teaching at Terrigal, Avoca and Copacabana with lessons, camps and board and wetsuit hire.

name: Institute of Froth
note: Surfing NSW affiliated school permitted to teach at both North Avoca and Terrigal beaches, offering private, group, kids and NDIS lessons.

name: Central Coast Surf School
note: A long-running Central Coast surf school based at Avoca Beach with experienced instructors and structured lesson plans.

name: Port Macquarie Surf School
note: Family-owned award-winning school running daily lessons at Rainbow and Town beaches, teaching in Port Macquarie since 1981.

name: Soul Surfing
note: Family-owned Port Macquarie school running two-hour small-group beginner lessons covering surf safety and technique, seven days a week.

name: Lee Winkler's Surf School
note: Coffs Harbour school with accredited Level 1 Surfing Australia coaches teaching beginner to intermediate lessons and weekly surf camps.

name: Solitary Islands Surf School
note: Surfing Australia accredited school teaching at Woolgoolga, Emerald, Darlington, Sawtell and Minnie Water beaches with group, private and SurfGroms programs.

name: Yamba-Angourie Surf School
note: The original Yamba surf school since 2001, run by an Australian champion, offering private, group and school lessons licensed by Surfing Australia.

name: Surf Camp Down Under
note: Leading Clarence Valley surf school running lessons at Yamba, Angourie, Brooms Head and Minnie Waters.

name: Ballina Surf School
note: Group and private coaching with accredited local surf guides at the Lennox Head National Surfing Reserve and other Ballina beaches.

name: Kool Katz Surf School
note: Ballina-based school offering budget group lessons and private tuition across its licensed Ballina beaches.

name: Summerland Surf School
note: Northern-rivers surf school running lessons at Lennox Head and Evans Head.

name: Soul Surf School
note: Beachfront Byron Bay school, the only one permitted to teach at both Byron Bay and Lennox Head, offering group, private and surf-and-stay packages.

name: Byron Bay Surf School
note: Byron Bay learn-to-surf operator offering lessons and multi-day surf camps on the region's beginner-friendly beaches.

name: Mojosurf
note: Surf-camp operator running half-day and multi-day Byron Bay lessons with transport to the best learner waves, plus camps along the east coast.

name: Illawarra Surf Academy
note: Surfing Australia accredited, locally owned academy running lessons at Corrimal, Thirroul and Warilla beaches seven days a week.

name: Pines Surfing Academy
note: Group and private lessons at North Wollongong Beach and The Farm at Killalea Regional Park, plus multi-day holiday programs and a grom camp.

name: Jervis Bay Surf School
note: Locally owned school running lessons and board hire around Jervis Bay and Sussex Inlet on the NSW South Coast.

name: Gerringong Surf School
note: The only Surfing Australia accredited surf school in the Gerringong-Kiama area, teaching beginners to advanced with boards and wetsuits included.

name: Walking On Water Surf School
note: Multi-award-winning Shoalhaven water-sports coaching company specialising in beginner to competition-level learn-to-surf around Ulladulla.

name: Surf Camp Australia
note: Australia's original overnight learn-to-surf camp operating since 1999 beside Seven Mile Beach at Gerroa, two hours south of Sydney.

name: Australian Surf Tours
note: South Coast NSW operator offering all-inclusive day trips and 7- and 14-day learn-to-surf camps an hour south of Sydney.

name: Broadbeach Surf School
note: Teaching surfing to all ages and abilities on Broadbeach in the heart of the Gold Coast since 2006.

name: Currumbin Alley Surf School
note: Year-round lessons at Currumbin Alley, the Gold Coast's most learner-friendly break, and a repeat Tripadvisor Travellers' Choice winner.

name: Surf Easy Surf School
note: Running surfing lessons and board hire at Currumbin Alley on the Gold Coast since 1994.

name: Godfathers of the Ocean Surf School
note: Operating since 2001 in front of the Burleigh Heads Surf Club, offering group, private, ladies-only and SurfGroms lessons plus bodyboarding.

name: Coolangatta Learn To Surf
note: Family-run since 1991 at Rainbow Bay and Coolangatta, offering group and private lessons plus multi-day school-holiday programs for kids and adults.

name: Kirra Point Surf School
note: Southern Gold Coast surf school offering lessons for all ages plus a 'Salty Groms' kids program near Kirra Point.

name: Surf In Paradise
note: Small-group beginner lessons (max six) at The Spit near Surfers Paradise, where a break wall shelters ideal learner waves.

name: Surfing Services Australia
note: Gold Coast surf school running learn-to-surf lessons and programs across the city's beaches.

name: Australian Surfing Adventures
note: The Gold Coast's only full-time surf camp, based on South Stradbroke Island, offering 1-to-10-day learn-to-surf camps and tours.

name: North Stradbroke Island Surf School
note: Coaching at Point Lookout since 1987 with Surfing Australia Level 1 and 2 accredited coaches, offering private and group lessons plus video analysis.

name: Noosa Learn to Surf
note: Noosa's longest-running surf school, founded in 1995 by former pro-am champion Merrick Davis, teaching year-round on Noosa Main Beach.

name: Surfdancer Academy of Surf
note: Private and small-group surf coaching on Noosa's beaches for all levels, plus signature surf-dance classes.

name: Go Ride A Wave
note: Established 1987, running group and private lessons and surf retreats at Noosa Heads on the Sunshine Coast.

name: Maroochy Surf School
note: Group and private lessons at Maroochydore and Mooloolaba main beaches for ages eight and up.

name: Robbie Sherwell's XL Surfing Academy
note: Teaching adults and kids at Mooloolaba and Alexandra Heads beaches with a small student-to-coach ratio and a high-performance academy.

name: Coolum Surf School
note: Operating over 20 years at Tickle Park, Coolum Beach with Surfing Australia accredited coaches running group and private lessons.

name: Caloundra Surf School
note: Runs 90-minute group and private surf lessons on Caloundra beaches with all boards and rash shirts or wetsuits supplied.

name: North Caloundra Surf School
note: Comprehensive surf-awareness and board-riding lessons at Caloundra beaches for groups large and small plus private tuition.

name: Rainbow Beach Learn to Surf
note: ASI-accredited school running daily private and group lessons on Rainbow Beach main beach plus surfboard hire.

name: Reef 2 Beach Surf School
note: Daily lessons on Queensland's northernmost surf beach at Agnes Water, taught by accredited instructors for over 22 years.

name: Stylez Surf School
note: Surfing Australia affiliated school at Agnes Water running small-group learn-to-surf lessons plus surfboard and SUP hire.

name: Go Ride A Wave
note: Australia's best-known surf school (est. 1987) running lessons and hire at Torquay, Ocean Grove, Anglesea, Lorne and along the Great Ocean Road.

name: Torquay Surfing Academy
note: Surfing Australia recognised academy teaching at Torquay, Jan Juc, Bancoora, Point Addis and Lorne, with private and group lessons and a large hire fleet.

name: Southern Exposure
note: Great Ocean Road adventure operator running surf lessons at Torquay, Anglesea, Lorne and Ocean Grove, plus multi-day surf camps and coaching.

name: Great Ocean Road Surf Schools
note: Daily beginner group and private lessons at Torquay and other Great Ocean Road beaches.

name: Surf Sessions
note: Bellarine Peninsula school teaching at Ocean Grove, Raafs Beach and Barwon Heads, with learn-to-surf, development coaching and private lessons.

name: East Coast Surf School
note: Long-running Mornington Peninsula school based mainly at Point Leo (also Gunnamatta), offering 1.5-hour learn-to-surf lessons with gear supplied.

name: Mornington Peninsula Surf School
note: Mobile school teaching at Point Leo, Shoreham and Gunnamatta depending on conditions, offering lessons, surf retreats and school programs.

name: Salty Surf School
note: Small-group surf coaching at Point Leo and Shoreham foreshores, with public and private classes, kids' intros, SurfGroms, holiday camps and hire.

name: Island Surfboards Surf School
note: One of Australia's most established surf schools, teaching in the beginner-friendly waves of Smiths Beach on Phillip Island.

name: Port Fairy Surf School
note: Accredited school operating since 1999 at Port Fairy East Beach, Warrnambool Main Beach and Cape Bridgewater, offering surf, SUP and kayak lessons plus hire.

name: GO Surf School
note: Beginner-focused school teaching at Port Fairy, Warrnambool and Cape Bridgewater, with SurfGroms, kids' holiday programs, SUP lessons and board and SUP hire.

name: Apollo Bay Surf and Kayak
note: Great Ocean Road operator on Apollo Bay's main street offering coach-in-water surf lessons, seal kayak tours and surf, SUP, board and wetsuit hire.

name: Margaret River Surf School
note: Margaret River's official surf centre running two-hour beginner lessons designed for those new to the sport.

name: Margaret River Surfing Academy
note: The region's first established surf school, led by paramedic Simon Tien, offering lessons from $50 plus hire and private coaching.

name: Josh Palmateer's Surf Academy
note: Long-running surf academy in the Augusta-Margaret River shire teaching at Rivermouth beach where the river meets the ocean.

name: Yallingup Surf School
note: Surfing Australia accredited school at Yallingup Beach run by Crystal Wallace since 2008, offering group lessons, private coaching and equipment hire.

name: Surfing WA Surf School
note: Surfing WA's long-running school at Trigg Beach offering group and private lessons for all levels plus a women's course.

name: Go Surf Perth
note: Family-owned school teaching at Scarborough and Brighton beaches in summer and Leighton Beach in winter, with group, private and school-holiday courses.

name: Scarborough Beach Surf School
note: Family-run school operating at Scarborough Beach since 1986, offering group, private and kids' school-holiday lessons for beginners through advanced.

name: Midwest Surf School
note: Licensed school at Geraldton's Back Beach operating since 2005, with group and private lessons, SurfGroms and SUP instruction plus equipment hire.

name: Tide Riders Surf
note: ASI-accredited school running lessons at Fourth Beach, Esperance, with group, private, kids' and ladies-only classes plus surf tours and hire.

name: South Coast Surfing Lessons
note: Run by an accredited instructor at Ocean Beach, Denmark, offering individual and group lessons, school camps and board and wetsuit hire.

name: Mandurah Surf Lessons
note: Peel-region school teaching at Pyramids Beach, Avalon Bay and Falcon Bay, with beginner group lessons and kids' programs.

name: Surf & Sun
note: South Australia's leading surf school since 2001, running year-round lessons and school camps at Middleton, Moana, Goolwa, Robe and Kangaroo Island.

name: Kombi Surf
note: Surfing lessons, kids SurfGroms, school groups and equipment hire at Middleton Beach near Adelaide.

name: Surf Culture Australia
note: South Australia's original surf school since 1991, running lessons at Moana, Southport, Middleton and Goolwa.

name: Kingo Surfing
note: Surf lessons across the Fleurieu Peninsula (Goolwa, Middleton, Victor Harbor, Port Elliot) plus multi-day surf camps at Goolwa and Venus Bay.

name: Ocean Living Surf School
note: Goolwa Beach school 80 minutes south of Adelaide offering group and private lessons for kids, adults, women-only, corporate and school groups.

name: Neptune's Surf Coaching
note: Accredited Surfing Australia school at Corny Point on Yorke Peninsula teaching group and private lessons at Berry Bay, with a kids' surf camp and hire.

name: Charlie's Surf School
note: Robe's local surf school (est. 2009) running small-group, large-group and one-on-one beginner-to-intermediate lessons at Long Beach on the Limestone Coast.

name: Coastrider Surf Academy
note: Clifton Beach-based school named an Australian Surf School of the Year, teaching beginner to intermediate surfers plus SUP with school and SurfGroms programs.

name: 42 South Surf School
note: Operates on Tasmania's east coast at Scamander and at Clifton Beach near Hobart, offering private lessons, SurfGroms and surfboard, SUP and wetsuit hire.

name: Blue Lagoon SUP & Surf
note: Locally owned Hobart-area school running beginner learn-to-surf lessons at family-friendly Park Beach plus stand-up paddleboard lessons.
